capture_method: curl the public ReDoc docs page (openapi.taptools.io) and extract the embedded OpenAPI 3.0 spec object from the Redoc.init(...) call; stored as JSON
notes: TapTools OpenAPI 3.0 spec v2.0.5 (61 paths) preserved ahead of the TapTools company wind-down (announced 2026-06-02; API expected offline ~mid-June 2026). Extracted from the publicly-served docs page. This is the canonical record of the TapTools API surface.
